data.content:
This is an NUnit project using VSTest. Use the `--filter` option to filter by class:

```
dotnet test --filter FullyQualifiedName~ReportExporterTests
```

This matches any test whose fully qualified name contains `ReportExporterTests`, which will run both tests in that class and skip `ReportGeneratorTests`.

Alternatively, you can be more precise with the full namespace:

```
dotnet test --filter ClassName=Contoso.Reports.Tests.ReportExporterTests
```
